2606.11117.title: Towards Autonomous Accelerator Design: FPGA Accelerator Generation with SECDA
2606.11117.paper_summary: Designing FPGA-based accelerators for modern artificial intelligence workloads requires exploring a large and complex hardware design space that involves architectural parameters, data flow strategies, and memory hierarchies, making the process very time consuming. While existing methodologies such as SECDA enable rapid hardware-software co-design through SystemC simulation and FPGA execution, identifying efficient accelerator configurations remains a largely manual process requiring extensive domain knowledge. SECDA-DSE is a framework that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) into the SECDA ecosystem to guide design space exploration (DSE) of FPGA-based accelerators. It combines a structured DSE Explorer for generating candidate architectures with an LLM Stack that performs reasoning-guided exploration using retrieval-augmented generation and chain-of-thought prompting, coupled with a feedback loop for iterative and reinforced refinement. Building on our previous work introducing SECDA-DSE, this paper extends its evaluation by generating three accelerator designs, including element-wise vector multiplication, 2D convolution, and matrix transpose, and performing end-to-end execution on FPGA hardware. The results show that SECDA-DSE can generate SECDA-compliant accelerator designs that are successfully synthesized and executed on FPGA hardware. Furthermore, the generated designs capture kernel-specific trade-offs between compute parallelism and data movement, highlighting the potential of LLM-guided exploration to adapt architectural configurations across diverse workloads while reducing exploration time and the need for extensive human expertise.
2606.11117.paper_summary_zh: 設計基於FPGA的加速器以應對現代人工智慧工作負載需要探索一個龐大且複雜的硬體設計空間，這涉及架構參數、數據流策略和記憶體層次，使得這個過程非常耗時。雖然現有的方法論如SECDA通過SystemC模擬和FPGA執行實現了快速的硬體-軟體共同設計，但識別高效的加速器配置仍然是一個主要依賴手動過程，需要廣泛的領域知識。SECDA-DSE是一個將大型語言模型（LLMs）整合進SECDA生態系統的框架，以指導基於FPGA的加速器的設計空間探索（DSE）。它結合了一個結構化的DSE探索器，用於生成候選架構，以及一個LLM堆疊，該堆疊使用檢索增強生成和思維鏈提示進行推理引導的探索，並配合一個反饋循環以進行迭代和強化的精煉。在我們之前的工作中介紹SECDA-DSE的基礎上，本文通過生成三個加速器設計，包括元素級向量乘法、2D卷積和矩陣轉置，並在FPGA硬體上進行端到端執行，擴展了其評估。結果顯示SECDA-DSE可以生成符合SECDA標準的加速器設計，這些設計成功地在FPGA硬體上進行合成和執行。此外，生成的設計捕捉了計算並行性和數據移動之間的內核特定權衡，突顯了LLM引導探索在適應多樣工作負載的架構配置方面的潛力，同時減少探索時間和對廣泛人類專業知識的需求。
2606.11117.author: Vinamra Sharma et.al.
2606.11117.authors: Vinamra Sharma, Xingjian Fu, Jude Haris, José Cano
